MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-BIO_ORB.title: Bio Orb
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-BIO_ORB.descriptio: Orb: Reproduces and grants Orb Slots
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-BIO_ORB.smartDescr:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the end of turn, a random ally [gold]Channels[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Bio[/gold].
[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Gain [blue]1[/blue] Orb Slot
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SPIRIT_ORB.title: Spirit Orb
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SPIRIT_ORB.descrip: Orb: Allies can lend energy to boost this orbs damage. Evoking deals the damage to all enemies.
MULTIPLAYERCOLLECTION-SPIRIT_ORB.smartDe:
[gold]Passive:[/gold] At the start of turn, all allies create a [gold]Lend Energy[/gold].
[gold]Evoke:[/gold] Deal [blue]{Evoke}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
